turns.speaker: D
turns.text: elizabeth , how is elizabeth ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: elizabeth is doing okay . how is the doctor ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor is doing okay . so the doctor knows the nurse told elizabeth about dax . the doctor would like to tell dax a little bit about elizabeth , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . elizabeth is a 66-year-old female with a past medical history of significant for depression and hypertension who presents for elizabeth's annual exam . so elizabeth , it's been a year since the doctor has seen elizabeth .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: how is elizabeth doing ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: elizabeth is doing well . there's been so many events now that elizabeth and other people have been able to get vaccinated , elizabeth has been able to see elizabeth's grandkids again , go to more birthday parties , the ability to see elizabeth's grandkids again has been fantastic .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah , the doctor knows . the doctor has ... the doctor means , the doctor and elizabeth have had some communication over telehealth and that type of thing , but telehealth is not the same as being in-person , so the doctor is happy to see elizabeth today . now tell the doctor a little bit about , you know , the doctor and elizabeth have n't really got a chance to talk about elizabeth's depression . how is elizabeth ... how is elizabeth doing with elizabeth's depression ? the doctor knows the doctor and elizabeth have n't had elizabeth on medication in the past because elizabeth is on medication for other things . what are elizabeth's strategies with dealing with elizabeth's depression ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: so elizabeth has been going to therapy once a week for the past year . um , mostly virtually , um , but starting to get in-person . virtual therapy was a bit of a struggle , but elizabeth feels like being in-person with someone really helps elizabeth .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and do y- does elizabeth have a good support system at home ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , elizabeth does . elizabeth has elizabeth's husband and , uh , elizabeth's kids are right down the street from elizabeth , so elizabeth is very lucky .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . so that's good to hear . how about elizabeth's blood pressure ? did elizabeth buy the blood pressure cuff that the doctor-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . told elizabeth to ? okay . the doctor knows that the doctor and elizabeth have been in communication and elizabeth's blood pressures have been running okay . the last time the doctor spoke with elizabeth , how are elizabeth's blood pressures doing since the doctor and elizabeth last spoke ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: elizabeth's blood pressures've been doing well . elizabeth has been using the cuff , um , once a day , and elizabeth's blood pressures seem pretty normal .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and is elizabeth taking the lisinopril that the doctor prescribed ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . great . all right . so the doctor knows that elizabeth did a review of systems sheet with the nurse when elizabeth checked in . you know , the doctor knows that elizabeth was talking about some nasal congestion . does elizabeth have any other symptoms , chest pain , shortness of breath , abdominal pain , nausea or vomiting , anything like that ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: no ? okay . all right . well , the doctor wan na go ahead and do a quick physical exam , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon , show the doctor the vital signs . so here in the office , you know , elizabeth's blood pressure looks really good , as does elizabeth's heart rate . so elizabeth is doing a good job managing elizabeth's blood pressure . so the doctor is gon na take a listen to elizabeth's heart and lungs , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . so on physical examination , the doctor do n't appreciate any carotid bruits in elizabeth's neck . on elizabeth's heart exam the doctor do notice a slight 2/6 systolic ejection murmur , which the doctor and elizabeth've heard in the past , so the doctor think the slight 2/6 systolic ejection murmur is stable . elizabeth's lungs in- are nice and clear , and elizabeth have some trace lower extremity edema bilaterally , so all that means is , you know , the doctor agree , you know , maybe the doctor and elizabeth should watch elizabeth's diet a little bit better , okay ? but the doctor wan na take a look at some of elizabeth's results , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . hey , dragon , show the doctor the ekg . and the nurses did an ekg before elizabeth came in , and the ekg looks perfectly fine , okay ? so the doctor wan na just go ahead and talk a little about elizabeth's assessment and the doctor's plan for elizabeth . so for elizabeth's first problem , elizabeth's depression , the doctor think elizabeth is doing a really good job with elizabeth's strategies . the doctor do n't think ... elizabeth's depression does n't sound to the doctor like the doctor need to start elizabeth on any medication at this time , unless elizabeth feel differently .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , elizabeth is , elizabeth is , good in that department .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: for elizabeth's second problem , elizabeth's high blood pressure , the doctor agree , everything looks fine here now . the doctor wan na just continue on the lisinopril , 20 milligrams a day . and the doctor want elizabeth to continue to watch elizabeth's blood pressures as well , and if elizabeth's blood pressures start rising , the doctor want elizabeth to contact the doctor , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and for elizabeth's third problem , for an annual exam maintenance , you know , elizabeth is due for a mammogram , so the doctor will go ahead and schedule the mammogram , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: all right .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . does elizabeth have any questions ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , can elizabeth take all elizabeth's medicine at the same time ? does taking all elizabeth's medicine at the same time matter ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah . elizabeth can set an alarm so that the alarm reminds elizabeth to take elizabeth's medication . but yeah , elizabeth can , elizabeth can take elizabeth's medications altogether .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . hey , dragon , finalize the note .
